Academic Programs

 

Addiction Counseling Certificate

Boost your career by mastering the diagnosis, treatment, and ethical considerations of addiction counseling. 
 

Details

 

Aeronautical Meteorology Forecaster Certificate

Specialized instruction in aviation weather forecasting for aspiring meteorologists and professionals.

Details

 

Applied Behavior Analysis Certificate

Credentialed program providing evidence-based strategies for behavior modification and intervention.

Details

 

Applied Leadership Certificate

Dynamic program focused on developing leadership, communication, and strategic skills.

Details

 

Athlete Engineering Certificate

Specialized program combining engineering principles and sports science for athlete optimization.

Details

 

Bachelor of Applied Science in Business Office Technology

Tailored program to empower students with the skills and knowledge crucial for success in business and administrative roles.

Details

 

Bachelor of Applied Science in Construction Technology

Earn your online Bachelor of Applied Science in Construction Technology. Designed for AAS graduates ready to advance in construction management.

Details

 

Bachelor of Applied Science in Cybersecurity

Innovative program preparing cybersecurity analysts with theoretical knowledge and practical skills.

Details

 

Bachelor of Applied Science in Healthcare Administration

Gain the knowledge needed to excel in leadership across various healthcare settings.

Details

 

Bachelor of Applied Science in Organizational Leadership

Develop strategic leadership skills for today’s dynamic, fast-paced professional environments.

Details

 

Bachelor of Applied Science in Professional Studies

Degree enhances technical education, equipping students to become future leaders.

Details

 

Bachelor of Applied Science in Public Management

A flexible curriculum blending theoretical and practical skills, cultivating expertise in public management

Details

 

Bachelor of Applied Science in Weather and Environmental Science

Flexible program designed for both military advancement and civilian careers in forecasting, climate analysis, and environmental operations.

Details

 

Bachelor of Applied Sociology

Think scientifically and practically about societies, human behavior, and social dimensions

Details

 

Bachelor of Arts in Communication, Media & Theatre with a concentration in Communication & Media Studies

Dynamic program focusing on developing effective communication skills across various media platforms.

Details

 

Bachelor of Arts in Communication, Media & Theatre with a concentration in Public Relations

Program focusing on developing effective communication strategies to pursue careers in public relations and related fields.

Details

 

Bachelor of Arts in History

Specialized program building students’ comprehensive historical knowledge and critical skills, while also tailored to your interests.

Details

 

Bachelor of Business Administration

Program preparing students for careers in areas such as management, finance, entrepreneurship, and other business-related fields.

Details

 

Bachelor of Science in Applied Behavior Analysis

Gain comprehensive training, certification preparation, and real-world skills for behavior analysis.

Details

 

Bachelor of Science in Educational Psychology

Specialized degree program that prepares students for careers in education, counseling, and research.

Details

 

Bachelor of Science in Electrical Engineering

Program spans the disciplines of electronics, electromagnetic fields, computers, and energy systems.

Details

 

Bachelor of Science in Elementary Education with concentrations in Early Childhood or Middle School

Specialized program designed to develop effective educators in elementary and middle school settings.

Details

 

Bachelor of Science in Geosciences with a concentration in Broadcast and Operational Meteorology

Combines the study of the Earth’s processes to weather forecasting.

Details

 

Bachelor of Science in Healthcare Administration

Navigate healthcare finance, healthcare law, and the specialized healthcare regulatory environment.

Details

 

Bachelor of Science in Human Development and Family Science with a concentration in Child Development

Program that explores the complexities of human growth, family dynamics, and child development.

Details

 

Bachelor of Science in Human Development and Family Science with a concentration in Youth Development

Program offers an interdisciplinary lifespan approach to the study of children, youth, and families.

Details

 

Bachelor of Science in Industrial and Systems Engineering

Degree program equipping students with the skills to excel in engineering careers in manufacturing, logistics, and healthcare sectors.

Details

 

Bachelor of Science in Industrial Technology

Specialized program preparing students for careers in industrial, manufacturing, and process technology.

Details

 

Bachelor of Science in Interdisciplinary Studies

Degree program that allows students to explore multiple fields to create a unique educational experience.

Details

 

Bachelor of Science in Learning and User Experience Design

Design engaging learning experiences through creativity, empathy, and technology.

Details

 

Bachelor of Science in Psychology

Comprehensive program that immerses students in the study of human behavior and mental processes.

Details

 

Bachelor of University Studies

Flexible online program helping adults achieve degree completion and career goals.

Details

 

Broadcast and Operational Meteorology Endorsement

Instruction in meteorology for weather forecasting.

Details

 

Certificate in One Health

Boost your career by mastering the diagnosis, treatment, and ethical considerations of One Health. 

Details

 

Climate Hazards Certificate

Gain expertise in climate processes, impacts, and solutions for environmental challenges.

Details

 

Companion Animal Management Endorsement

Skilled instruction for effective management and care of animal companions.

Details

 

Data Science Pedagogy Certificate

Education emphasizing effective teaching methods for conveying concepts in data science.

Details

 

Doctor of Education in Educational Policy & Organizational Design

Degree designed to prepare scholar-practitioners serving in educational settings and professional agencies

Details

 

Doctor of Philosophy in Community College Leadership

Elevate community colleges to the next level by preparing yourself for professional leadership positions.

Details

 

Doctor of Philosophy in Computational Engineering

Cutting-edge program emphasizing advanced research and innovation in technology-driven solutions.

Details

 

Doctor of Philosophy in Computer Science

Instruction in areas such as Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Data Visualization, Database Management, and more.

Details

 

Doctor of Philosophy in Electrical and Computer Engineering

Advanced program cultivating expertise and innovation in engineering and technology fields.

Details

 

Doctor of Philosophy in Engineering with a concentration in Aerospace Engineering

Advanced expertise in fluid dynamics, structural mechanics, controls, and autonomous systems for academia or industry.

Details

 

Doctor of Philosophy in Engineering with a concentration in Chemical Engineering

Cutting-edge degree program researching topics such as chemical catalysis and reaction engineering, modeling and simulation, and more.

Details

 

Doctor of Philosophy in Engineering with a concentration in Civil Engineering

Advanced course work designed to empower civil engineers for leadership and career progress.

Details

 

Doctor of Philosophy in Engineering with a concentration in Engineering Education

Interdisciplinary instruction combining theory and practice to equip future educators and scholars.

Details

 

Doctor of Philosophy in Engineering with a concentration in Mechanical Engineering

Expertise in sustainable and renewable energy systems, multi-scale modeling, and thermodynamics for academia, industry, labs.

Details

 

Doctor of Philosophy in Industrial and Systems Engineering

Advanced studies in industrial, manufacturing or management systems, operations research, and human factors and ergonomics.

Details

 

Doctor of Philosophy in Instructional Systems and Workforce Development

Develop your passion for learning and problem solving tailored to your unique career goals.

Details

 

Doctor of Philosophy in Plant and Soil Sciences with a concentration in Agronomy

Research-driven study to increase the production efficiency of agronomic crops and improve the quality of food, feed, and fiber.

Details

 

Doctor of Philosophy in Plant and Soil Sciences with a concentration in Horticulture

Cultivate educational and research opportunities for global impact on the fruit, flowers, and ornamentals industry.

Details

 

Doctor of Philosophy in Plant and Soil Sciences with a concentration in Weed Science

Comprehensive study of vegetation management in various residential and urban areas.

Details

 

Educational Specialist in Education with a Concentration in Counselor Education

Post-master’s online program advancing counseling expertise for education professionals nationwide.

Details

 

Educational Specialist in Education with a concentration in School Administration

Prepare ambitious educators for leadership roles in school administration, empowering them with the skills and knowledge.

Details

 

Educational Specialist in Education with a concentration in School Psychology

Tailored program equipping students to address academic and behavioral challenges in a school environment

Details

 

Educational Specialist in Education with a concentration in Teacher Leadership

Empowers educators to lead change, improve instruction, and foster collaborative learning in positive school cultures.

Details

Educational Specialist in Education with a concentration in Technology

Earn your 100% online Ed.S. in Technology at Mississippi State. Advance your expertise in instructional technology with flexible, no-GRE admission.

Details

 

ENGAGE VR Creator Certificate

Discover the cutting-edge ENGAGE VR Creator Certificate, tailored to meet the surging demand for skilled professionals in the rapidly evolving educational technology landscape.

Details

 

Environment and Sustainability Certificate

Comprehensive program in environmental stewardship and sustainable practices for professionals.

Details

 

General Biology Certificate

Extensive program exploring foundational concepts and practical applications in biology.

Details

 

Geography and Geology Community College Teaching Certificate

Gain the knowledge to teach geography and geology at the community college level.

Details

 

Geology Certificate

Comprehensive program exploring Earth sciences, natural hazards, and oceanography.

Details

 

Geospatial and Remote Sensing Certificate

Specialized education in geospatial analysis and remote sensing technologies for professionals.

Details

 

Global Affairs and Leadership Certificate

Gain leadership skills and global expertise to succeed in various international and professional settings.

Details

 

Master of Agribusiness Management

Interdisciplinary degree that includes core MBA courses to equip future agribusiness leaders.

Details

 

Master of Agriculture with a concentration in Animal and Dairy Sciences

Comprehensive program in the science of animal management and husbandry.

Details

 

Master of Agriculture – Agricultural and Extension Education Concentration

Develop skills in agricultural education, leadership, communication, and community development.

Details

 

Master of Applied Data Science

Learn to master data science concepts and gain practical, hands-on experience using data science methods.

Details

 

Master of Applied Science in Industrial Technology

Learn to lead innovation, manage projects, and solve industry challenges.

Details

 

Master of Applied Science in Organizational Leadership

Develop real-world leadership skills to lead with confidence and impact.

Details

 

Master of Arts in Teaching - Community College Education

Educate the leaders of tomorrow by preparing yourself to teach in a community college classroom.

Details

 

Master of Arts in Teaching - Secondary Teacher Alternate Route

Earn your teaching license for middle or high school settings even if your bachelor’s degree is in another field.

Details

 

Master of Arts in Teaching - Special Education

Make a positive impact on the lives of children with special needs and become a special education teacher.

Details

 

Master of Arts in Teaching- Elementary Level Alternate Route

Pursue your K-6 teaching licensure with our hands-on residency program focused on practical classroom experience.

Details

 

Master of Business Administration

Nationally ranked program with an emphasis in accounting, management, marketing, and finance.

Details

 

Master of Engineering

Flexible degree with the unique opportunity to build an interdisciplinary course of study in general or military engineering.

Details

 

Master of Professional Accountancy

Prepare to meet the changing demands of the accounting field in the public, private, or governmental sector.

Details

 

Master of Public Policy and Administration

Professional program to develop leaders at the national, state, and local levels of government.

Details

 

Master of Science in Aerospace Engineering

Preparing engineers to design, develop, and advance aircraft, spacecraft, and defense technologies.

Details

 

Master of Science in Artificial Intelligence

Innovative program exploring AI, machine learning, and intelligent systems design.

Details

 

Master of Science in Chemical Engineering

Find your niche with nationally recognized faculty exploring a diverse range of research interests in chemical engineering.

Details

 

Master of Science in Civil Engineering

Instruction fostering expertise in infrastructure and construction practices.

Details

 

Master of Science in Computational Engineering

Discover approaches to solving analytical problems by using mathematical and computational tools to arrive at solutions.

Details

 

Master of Science in Computer Science

Cutting-edge program advancing knowledge and innovation in computing and technology.

Details

 

Master of Science in Conservation Education

Become a conservation education leader with accredited, innovative, and comprehensive training.

Details

 

Master of Science in Construction Management

Graduates of the Master of Science in Construction Management are prepared for leadership and specialized roles across the construction industry

Details

 

Master of Science in Counselor Education with a concentration in Rehabilitation Counseling

Become an expert in behavior-based strategies for application in diverse rehabilitation settings.

Details

 

Master of Science in Cyber Security and Operations

Multidisciplinary program equipping students with solutions to growing cyber security challenges.

Details

 

Master of Science in Data Science

Managing, processing, and extracting value from large and diverse data sets

Details

 

Master of Science in Early Intervention

Develop skills to work with infants to preschoolers with special needs acknowledging the central role of the family in various environments.

Details

 

Master of Science in Educational Leadership with a concentration in School Administration

Prepare for a wide range of professional administrative positions in education.

Details

 

Master of Science in Educational Leadership with a concentration in Teacher Leadership

Understand leadership theory, effective communication strategies and more to improve your P-12 classroom.

Details

 

Master of Science In Educational Psychology - Applied Behavior Analysis

Comprehensive program offering evidence-based techniques and strategies to develop the leadership qualities to excel in the field behavior analysis.

Details

 

Master of Science in Educational Psychology - General Educational Psychology

Explore the field of Educational Psychology with a program designed for a comprehensive study of the science of learners and learning

Details

 

Master of Science in Electrical and Computer Engineering

Advanced program fostering expertise in electrical systems and computer technology.

Details

 

Master of Science in Engineering

Build advanced skills in engineering research, application, and professional practice.

Details

 

Master of Science in Food Science, Nutrition, & Health Promotion with a concentration in Health Promotion

Comprehensive program emphasizing health promotion within the realm of food science.

Details

 

Master of Science in Forestry

Specialized program mastering the art of forestry, from forest economics to genetics.

Details

 

Master of Science in General Biology

Tailored for secondary school teachers wanting to expand knowledge in ecology and biotechnology.

Details

 

Master of Science in Geosciences with a concentration in Applied Meteorology

In-depth program specializing in weather analysis and practical meteorological applications.

Details

 

Master of Science In Geosciences with a concentration in Environmental Geosciences

Comprehensive program with exploration of the geosciences field for aspiring Geo technicians and professionals.

Details

 

Master of Science in Industrial and Systems Engineering

Cutting-edge program emphasizing process optimization and innovation in engineering disciplines.

Details

 

Master of Science in Information Systems

Develops skilled information systems professionals for global business with an understanding of technical expertise, communication skills, and business understanding.

Details

 

Master of Science in Instructional Technology

Instructional program to support effective learning designed for educators or industry professionals.

Details

 

Master of Science in Mechanical Engineering

Program fostering expertise and innovation in engineering that focuses on the design, analysis, and manufacturing of mechanical systems.

Details

 

Master of Science in Plant and Soil Sciences with a concentration in Agronomy

Specialized program in agronomy fostering expertise in crop production and management.

Details

 

Master of Science in Plant and Soil Sciences with a concentration in Horticulture

Extensive research program focusing on global impact on fruit, vegetables, floral, and ornaments industries.

Details

 

Master of Science in Plant and Soil Sciences with a concentration in Weed Science

A dynamic program consists of solving vegetation management challenges and gaining comprehensive knowledge in biological control, cropping systems, and so much more.

Details

 

Master of Science in Secondary Education

Program suitable for new and experienced educators that enhance expertise through theory, research, and practice.

Details

 

Master of Science in Special Education

Preparing leaders to implement innovative, evidence-based practices for lifelong success.

Details

 

Master of Science in Sustainable Bioproducts

Flexible program that enhances career prospects and promotes sustainable bioproducts for economic and environmental benefit.

Details

 

Master of Science in Workforce Education Leadership

Program specializing in advancing workforce development education and professional development.

Details

 

Master of Taxation

Instructional program that enhances tax expertise for accounting and business careers.

Details

 

Teaching English to Speakers of Other Languages Certificate

Instructional program for educators teaching English to non-native language speakers.

Details
